# My Workbench


```{python}
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    df = pd.read_csv('output_files/df_master_final_aggr.csv')
```

```{python}
    df.info()
    df.sample(10)
```


```{python}
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

# Categorias e ângulos
categorias = radar_norm.columns.tolist()
angles = np.linspace(0, 2 * np.pi, len(categorias), endpoint=False).tolist()
angles += angles[:1]

# Plot
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 10), subplot_kw=dict(polar=True))

cores = {'P1': '#2E86AB', 'P2': '#E84855'}
nomes = {'P1': 'Marlon', 'P2': 'Letícia'}

for pessoa in radar_norm.index:
    valores = radar_norm.loc[pessoa].tolist()
    valores += valores[:1]
    
    ax.plot(angles, valores, 'o-', linewidth=2.5, label=nomes[pessoa], color=cores[pessoa])
    ax.fill(angles, valores, alpha=0.2, color=cores[pessoa])

ax.set_xticks(angles[:-1])
ax.set_xticklabels(categorias, size=12)
ax.set_ylim(0, 1)

plt.legend(loc='upper right', bbox_to_anchor=(1.2, 1.1), fontsize=12)
plt.title('Perfil de Comunicação\nMarlon vs Letícia', size=16, fontweight='bold', pad=20)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```
